name: About Page Default Layout
description: About-page layout for the Court Piece Electric Mahal theme.

config.hero.title: Inside Court Piece Electric Mahal
config.hero.subtitle: Step into a high-voltage card arena built for quick rounds, bold table energy, and a smoother mobile-first play experience.
config.story.title: Why Players Remember The Mahal
config.story.subtitle: A louder home base for fast court-piece sessions
config.story.content: Court Piece Electric Mahal turns classic partnership card play into a brighter, more cinematic destination. The experience leans into sharp table chemistry, rapid entry, and strong visual contrast so every section feels alive instead of flat.
config.story.rail_1_text: Partnership rounds with quick reading and bold table pacing
config.story.rail_2_text: Electric contrast, dramatic motion, and clearer mobile scanning
config.story.rail_3_text: Players who want style, speed, and a memorable court-piece vibe
config.values.title: What Shapes The Experience
config.values.subtitle: The ideas behind every table-facing detail
config.team.title: Who Makes The Table Glow
config.team.subtitle: The crew behind the mahal atmosphere
config.cta.title: Ready To Join The Electric Table
config.cta.description: Move from story to action and connect with the Court Piece Electric Mahal team for updates, support, and the next big round.

notes: Header and footer inherit from the home-page layout.
